name: apple-mail
description: Natural language interface for Apple Mail -- search, compose, triage, organize, analyze, and verify drafts with 31 MCP tools plus bundled workflow skills.

interface.shortDescription: Draft-safe Apple Mail workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Natural language Apple Mail workflows for Codex and Claude: search, compose drafts, reply, forward, triage, organize, analyze, export, and manage attachments through a local macOS MCP server. Default plugin launches with --draft-safe so agents create reviewable drafts instead of sending mail.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my inbox and draft replies.
Find emails from this week that need action.
